page_title: List of scabbards and canisters (Attack on Titan 2 Game)
text:
Scabbards and Canisters are part of the player's omni-directional mobility gear in Attack on Titan 2 and are listed together as Scabbards/Canisters in game. The two cannot be upgraded separately. They are rated by Gas Capacity (how much gas the player has before they must refuel), Gas Pressure (how fast they can boost), and Max Blades (how many spare blades the player can carry).

Scabbards and Canisters can be further fortified for additional Gas Capacity and Gas Pressure.

Trivia

The scabbard and canister with the highest Gas Capacity is the Blazing Axel with a base Gas Capacity of 1000.
The scabbard and canister with the highest Gas Pressure is the Demon God Scabbard Mk II with a base Gas Pressure of 1000.
The scabbard and canister with the Max Blades is a tie between the Alpha Fuel and Magi Coffin scabbard and canister lineages with a Max Blades of 7.
